mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or forward returns are not significantly positive when FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and deteriorating corporate earnings prospects, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 55% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 5.0%, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio is negative.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate a synchronized contraction in consumer and residential investment demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which translates to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days specifically during early-cycle recovery phases.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) during post-shock recovery regimes or generates negative alpha when INDPRO trends upward.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained increases in total nonfarm payrolls indicate robust labor market expansion and rising household income, supporting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are not significantly positive following payroll increases, or rolling Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 280.0, accelerating inflation triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in > 60% of periods where CPIAUCSL breaches 280.0, or inflation threshold fails to separate return distributions.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly retail sales confirms broad-based demand expansion, reinforcing corporate revenue forecasts and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined GDPC1 and RSAFS growth fails to yield positive forward returns with p < 0.05, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production alongside stable employment signals a supply-side bottleneck that pressures corporate margins, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days during periods of constrained capacity.
failure_condition: Signal produces positive returns in > 50% of triggered instances during capacity constrained regimes, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling windows.
